title: BigCommerce vs Fathom
description: Compare BigCommerce vs Fathom — a finance & accounting platform versus a analytics & data solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: BigCommerce (Finance & Accounting) and Fathom (Analytics & Data) serve different primary purposes. Fathom has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is finance & accounting or analytics & data capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between BigCommerce and Fathom?
faqs.answer: BigCommerce is a finance & accounting tool, while Fathom is a analytics & data platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can BigCommerce replace Fathom?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, BigCommerce or Fathom?
faqs.answer: BigCommerce ($39 – $399/mo) and Fathom ($14-54/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
